description: You are a robotics engineer configuring a pipeline crawler's inspection camera to match a real Pan-Tilt-Zoom (PTZ) hardware module. Upgrade the 'inspection_camera' on the 'CRAWLER_ROBOT' by setting its resolution to 1920x1080 and fieldOfView to 1.57 radians. Configure a Focus node with a focalLength of 0.05, minFocalDistance of 0.1, and maxFocalDistance of 10.0. Additionally, configure a Zoom node with a maxFieldOfView of 1.57 and a minFieldOfView of 0.157. Save the world to /home/ga/Desktop/ptz_inspection_camera.wbt.
